userPromptSubmit.name: archive-warning
userPromptSubmit.description: Warn when archive data is requested
args: if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -iq 'archive'; then echo '{"message": "⚠️  Archive folder excluded by default. Specify explicitly if needed."}'; fi; exit 0

userPromptSubmit.name: broad-search-reminder
userPromptSubmit.description: Remind about token efficiency for broad searches
args: if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -Eiq 'search (the )?(entire|whole|all)|find (all|everything)'; then echo '{"message": "💡 Broad searches use many tokens. Consider being more specific."}'; fi; exit 0

preToolUse.name: read-validation
preToolUse.description: Validate file reads to prevent reading excluded files
args: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); if echo "$FILE" | grep -Eq '(archive/|node_modules/|\.zip$|\.log$)'; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "⛔ Blocked: This file is excluded for token efficiency. Use explicit override if needed."}'; exit 2; fi; exit 0

preToolUse.name: permission-auto-approve
args: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); if echo "$FILE" | grep -Eq '\.(js|html|css|md)$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'node_modules'; then echo '{"approve": true}'; fi; exit 0

postToolUse.name: large-file-warning
postToolUse.description: Warn when large files are read
args: if [ -n "$TOOL_OUTPUT" ]; then LINES=$(echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | wc -l); if [ "$LINES" -gt 500 ]; then echo '{"message": "📊 Large file read ('$LINES' lines). Consider line ranges for efficiency."}'; fi; fi; exit 0

sessionStart.name: welcome-message
sessionStart.description: Show optimization tips at session start
args: echo '{"message": "✨ Optimization active! Use skills (code-review, quick-fix, code-explain) or check .claude/CHEATSHEET.md"}'; exit 0
